summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Orders Tab, Dispatch Edit/Delete, and Ticket Reply features. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All new features verified via UI testing.

data_issues.note: VoltDoctor tickets have empty customer_name/customer_phone/customer_email fields - this is pre-existing data from earlier sync before the mapping was enhanced. The voltdoctor_sync.py code correctly handles both user_* and customer_* field naming conventions.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Orders feature is fully functional. Ticket Reply adds messages to ticket history and works with VoltDoctor sync. All dispatch endpoints (GET/PATCH/DELETE) working correctly.

admin_orders_tab.orders_link_in_sidebar: PASS - 'Orders' link visible in admin sidebar
admin_orders_tab.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Total Orders (2), Pending (0), Shipped (1), Delivered (0)
admin_orders_tab.orders_table: PASS - Shows dispatch_type='new_order' orders with all columns
admin_orders_tab.view_order_dialog: PASS - Shows order details (Order Number, Status, Created, Customer, SKU, Order ID, Payment Ref, Courier, Tracking ID)
admin_orders_tab.edit_order_dialog: PASS - Form with Customer Name, Phone, Address, Order ID, Payment Reference, Status dropdown, Reason/Notes
admin_orders_tab.delete_order_dialog: PASS - Confirmation dialog with warning 'This action cannot be undone'

admin_dispatch_edit.update_status: PASS - Status updated to 'shipped' then restored

admin_dispatch_delete.delete_confirmation: PASS - Frontend shows confirmation dialog before delete

ticket_reply.reply_adds_to_history: PASS - Reply messages appear in Ticket Journey Timeline
ticket_reply.reply_with_status_change: PASS - Can reply and change ticket status simultaneously
ticket_reply.reply_updates_agent_notes: PASS - Agent notes updated with reply content

voltdoctor_tickets.tickets_synced: PASS - 17 VoltDoctor tickets visible in All Tickets
voltdoctor_tickets.voltdoctor_id_tracking: PASS - All VoltDoctor tickets have voltdoctor_id field
